notes.continuation_of: prior stalled phaser-ecology-scene-attacher run 2026-04-28T07:30:00Z (no receipt; partial work on disk — import block at lines 30-33 and preloadEcologyAssets call at lines 52-55 were already present)

preflight_quotes.arc_md_section4: Carry-forward systems live in `src/renderer/game/systems/` with no scene imports. Systems do not know what scene they are mounted in. (arc.md §4 Architectural Discipline)
preflight_quotes.ecology_substrate_md: EcologyEntity is not a renderer. It does not own sprites, tweens, or visual style. It does not own scene layout — those positions live in `public/layouts/<scene>.layout.json` and are loaded via `loadLayout()`. (ecology-substrate.md §1 Purpose)
preflight_quotes.index_js_registerEntity_docstring: Register a single EcologyEntity into the substrate's per-scene registry. Resolves defaults, derives relationship fields, attaches the interaction zone, and returns the populated entity. (src/renderer/game/systems/ecology/index.js registerEntity docstring)
preflight_quotes.ecologyAssetManifest_js: ECOLOGY_ASSET_KEYS.animals.coyote -> 'ecology.animal.coyote' (ecologyAssetManifest.js lines 95-99 ECOLOGY_ASSET_KEYS shape, built via buildKey('animals', name) -> 'ecology.animal.<name>')
preflight_quotes.StreetBlockScene_js_plant_comment: Register each layout-driven plant as an EcologyEntity so the ecology substrate can track observations and forage events alongside the existing plant-interaction flow. (StreetBlockScene.js lines 267-272)
preflight_quotes.quests_js_food_chain_tracker: id: 'observe_prey', type: 'observe', text: 'Look for javelina or rabbits near the mesquite trees.', requiredObservation: 'javelina' (quests.js food_chain_tracker step observe_prey line ~294)
preflight_quotes.ecology_js_fauna_relationships: PREDATOR_CHAINS: { prey: 'javelina', predator: 'coyote', probability: 0.3 }, { prey: 'rabbit', predator: 'coyote', probability: 0.4 } — javelina, rabbit, coyote all present in fauna relationship maps (data/ecology.js lines 118-119)
preflight_quotes.phaser_ecology_scene_attacher_md: This is strictly additive. The scene's existing plant / animal interactables, item-grant logic, dialog, quest gating, and save calls must remain BYTE-IDENTICAL after your edit. (.claude/agents/phaser-ecology-scene-attacher.md)

notes.diff_stat_layout_json: public/layouts/street-block.layout.json | 28 ++++++++++++++++++++++ (28 insertions, 1 deletion — the 1 deletion is the trailing brace that was reformatted when the animals array was appended; existing object entries are byte-identical)
notes.existing_plant_lines_proof: grep -n 'attachEcologyTicker(this)' returns exactly line 291 (one occurrence). grep -n '_ecologyEntityIndex' returns lines 287, 289, 471 — all intact and unchanged.
notes.ticker_type_agnostic_citation: ecologyTicker.js:107-112 proximity-observation loop iterates all entities returned by listEntitiesForScene regardless of type field; fauna entities registered here will be polled identically to flora entities.
notes.sprite_display_size: setDisplaySize(48, 48) applied to match plant footprint — could not introspect PNG pixel dimensions from within this dispatch, so 48x48 is a safe default matching plant scale.
runtime_caveats: Coyote is night-active per data/ecology.js TIME_BEHAVIOR.night.activeAnimals (line 138). With the fauna-default timeOfDayRule, coyote will only fire proximity observations at night; during daytime the interaction zone is suppressed and sprite alpha is reduced per ecology-substrate.md §13.4. Javelina and rabbit are day-active (TIME_BEHAVIOR.day.activeAnimals) and will fire observations during normal play, satisfying food_chain_tracker step 4 (observe_prey 'javelina').
Sprite scale: setDisplaySize(48, 48) assumed. If PNGs are smaller than 48px the sprites will be upscaled. Runtime test should verify visual size matches plant footprint.
notes.predicted_runtime_progression: food_chain_tracker step 4/8 (observe_prey 'javelina') → player walks near javelina at x=330,y=500 → proximity observation fires → step advances to 5/8 (learn_predator dialogue) → 6/8 (quiz_chain) → 7/8 (harvest_mesquite forage) → 8/8 (complete_tracker)
